title: "Python API: Home"

# Python Protocol API

Welcome to the Protocol API.

## Aspirate { #aspirate-building-block }

Use `InstrumentContext.aspirate` to aspirate liquid.

```python
pipette.aspirate(100, plate["A1"])
```

## Flex only notes

=== "Flex"
    Flex robots support 96-channel pipettes.

=== "OT-2"
    OT-2 supports 1 and 8 channel pipettes.
